purpose: Canada vs US exam alignment — English source lives in public/i18n/en.json. Non-English locales: sync these concepts on purpose; do not blindly machine-translate.

terminology.preferPracticeExamOverMock: Product copy still mixes “mock” and “practice exam” in learner.* strings. When translating, prefer “practice exam” for nursing licensure surfaces unless the UI label must stay ultra-short.
terminology.regionSpecificExamNames: REx-PN / Canadian PN vs NCLEX-PN (US) vs NCLEX-RN — keep exam names aligned to pathway, not a single global string.

notes: Full grep for “mock” under learner.* in en.json recommended before locale sweep.
